category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chromaprint as the audio fingerprinting core component of AcoustID.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides chromaprint; source_facts.homepage is the official AcoustID Chromaprint page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official AcoustID Chromaprint page and best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies audio fingerprinting and AcoustID; source_facts.executables lists fpcalc.
